name: SOL Historical Backfill Pilot
scope: Research Lab data-engineering pilot only. Creates a separate SOLUSDT pilot snapshot under research_lab/snapshots and writes a markdown report. No strategy test, runtime change, PAPER deployment, LIVE deployment, or production DB write.
edge_rationale: SOL_DATA_FEASIBILITY_V1 confirmed SOL archive source availability. Before scheduling a full SOL 2022-2026 backfill and trial-00095 transfer test, the project must validate ingestion mechanics, disk slope, streaming aggTrades aggregation, and quality gates on a short SOL window.
counterparty_or_market_mechanism: No trading edge is tested. The milestone validates whether SOLUSDT historical archives can be materialized into the same deterministic research schema used by BTC/ETH.
required_data: SOLUSDT daily metrics ZIP for open interest
SOLUSDT daily aggTrades ZIP aggregated to 60s and 15m buckets
SOLUSDT funding REST history for pilot days
frozen_assumptions: Do not mutate BTC, ETH, production, PAPER, LIVE, runtime, or storage databases.
Raw ZIP archives are streamed per day and discarded after parsing.
SOL strategy transfer backtest is out of scope until a full SOL dataset is complete and audited.
SOL shadow or PAPER runtime is out of scope.
expected_observation: A successful pilot creates a small SOLUSDT research snapshot, reports row counts versus expected counts, measures DB size per day, estimates full 2022-2026 storage footprint, and leaves production runtime untouched.

kill_criteria.unsafe_path: Writing outside research_lab/snapshots invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.production_db_write: Any write to storage/btc_bot.db or production database invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.missingness: More than 1% missingness in required pilot tables blocks full backfill scheduling.
kill_criteria.quality_errors: OHLC violations, duplicates, or failed archive days require fix before full backfill.
kill_criteria.runtime_change: Any runtime/core/settings/execution change invalidates the milestone.

failure_modes: SOL aggTrades archives are much larger than ETH and threaten disk budget.
SOL metrics archive schema differs from ETH parser assumptions.
SOL historical archives pass HEAD probes but fail CSV parsing.
Funding REST history diverges from archive day boundaries.
Pilot succeeds but storage slope implies full backfill must run only on server.
out_of_scope: Changing runtime, PAPER, LIVE, core, orchestrator, risk, or execution behavior
author: Codex
